sa:items.rdfs:label: Abundant ammunition
sa:items.spell:description: Touched weapon does not expend ammo.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Affliction
sa:items.spell:description: You can cause the damage you deal to one enemy to echo in the minds of others. When one of the creatures you target takes damage, one of the other creatures you target that can hear you must make a Wisdom saving throw or take the same damage you dealt to the first creature. The damage is 1d6 psychic damage per level of the caster.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Animate dead
sa:items.spell:description: Animate the bones of the dead to do your bidding. Each corpse animated turns into a skeleton. The skeletons are under your control and follow your commands. They are not sentient and do not have free will.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Anticipate peril
sa:items.spell:description: The caster gains an heightened sense of impending danger. Gain advantage on initiative rolls, dexterity saving throws and stealth checks. The caster can also use their reaction to move up to half their movement speed and are immune to the suprised condition.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 1 minute / proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Arc
sa:items.spell:description: An arc of lightning jumps from your hand and continues jumping wildly from your initial target to other targets in range. The targets take 3d6 lightning damage each time they are hit. Chose an additional target up to a total of 3 targets have been hit.
sa:items.spell:target: 1 creature and up to 2 additional. All targets must be within 15ft of one of the others

sa:items.rdfs:label: Armor of the damned
sa:items.spell:description: Shadows slither towards you and curl around you to form a protective barrier. Gain 10 temporary hit points. Ranged attacks against you have disadvantage.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 5 rounds + proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Armor of the faithful
sa:items.spell:description: You are enveloped in a protective barrier of light. Gain 10 temporary hit points. You have resistance to radiant and necrotic damage.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 5 rounds + proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Army of the dead
sa:items.spell:description: You a swarm of undead skeletons to do your bidding. The skeletons are under your control and follow your commands. They are not sentient and do not have free will. Skeletons within 1 mile radious can be animated. The ritual can be cast once per day.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Attuned to the universe
sa:items.spell:description: You are attuned to the universe. Treat initiative rolls as 20. You can use your reaction to move up to half your movement speed, this can move you out of area effects and are immune to the suprised condition.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 10 minute / proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Bane
sa:items.spell:description: Hostile creatures within a 50 ft burst from the caster must save or gain a 1d4 penalty dice on attacks and saves
sa:items.spell:target: Hostile creatures within a 50ft burst from the caster

sa:items.rdfs:label: Barrier
sa:items.spell:description: Create a whirling barrier of winds able to slice trough meat and armor with ease. Creatures in the area take 10d10 slashing damage each round.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute per proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Bind elements
sa:items.spell:description: Bind primal elements to an archaic weapon. The weapon does 1d6 extra elemental damage of the casters choosing.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Black tentacles
sa:items.spell:description: Squirming, ebony tentacles fill a 20-foot square on ground that you can see within range. For the duration, these tentacles turn the ground in the area into difficult terrain. Creatures in the area take 5d6 necrotic damage each round and must make a dexterity saving throw or become grappled.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Blade ward
sa:items.spell:description: A shimmering forcefield cocoon springs to life around you. Gain resistance to piercing, slashing and bludgeoning damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Bless
sa:items.spell:description: Allied creatures gain a bonus on attacks and saves. Targets gain a 1d4 bonus on saves and attack rolls.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 1 minute / proficiency bonus
sa:items.spell:target: Caster and allies within 50 ft burst from caster.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Blur
sa:items.spell:description: Your form blurs, becoming more difficult to see. Attacks against you have disadvantage.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute per proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Burglar's buddy
sa:items.spell:description: Stop mechanical, optical and electrical alarms from triggering around you. Become invisible to cameras.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 10 minutes / proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Burning hands
sa:items.spell:description: A sheet of flame shoots from your fingertips. Targets take 3d6 fire damage. Targets can make a dexterity saving throw or halve the damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Charm person
sa:items.spell:description: Make a humanoid target your friend, for a while. Targets must make a wisdom saving throw or become charmed by you for the duration. While charmed, the target is friendly to you.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Chromatic Orb
sa:items.spell:description: You hurl a 4-inch-diameter sphere of energy at a creature that you can see within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 3d8 elemental damage of the caster's choosing. At Higher Levels. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Conjure spellfighter
sa:items.spell:description: Conjure a ultralight spacecraft. It appears in space nearest to you that can accomodate it. If no such space is available within the range of the ritual, the ritual fails.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Counterspell
sa:items.spell:description: You attempt to interrupt a creatures spellcasting. If spend a spellslot of the same level as your target you succeed. If you do not have a spell slot of the same level as your target, you must make a concentration check with a DC of 10 + the level of the spell. On a success, you interrupt the spell and the spellcaster must make a concentration check with a DC of 10 + the level of the spell. On a failure, the spellcaster can continue casting the spell.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Create undeath
sa:items.spell:description: Animate the bones of the dead to do your bidding. Create a wight, spectre or ghoul. The ritual can be cast once per day.
sa:items.spell:target: 1 corpse in Touch range per 1 hour of the ritual

sa:items.rdfs:label: Create water
sa:items.spell:description: Water condenses in the air at a point you choose, falling like rain or filling a container such as a bucket or a skin.
sa:items.spell:duration: Until drunk, then it stays in the drinker as normal, else 1 day

sa:items.rdfs:label: Crown of madness
sa:items.spell:description: One humanoid of your choice that you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or fly into a rage attacking the nearest creature. While the target is charmed in this way, a twisted crown of jagged iron appears on its head, and a madness glows in its eyes.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Culling
sa:items.spell:description: Suck in the life energies from surrounding creatures. Targets in the area take 4d6 necrotic damage each round. Targets can make a constitution saving throw or halve the damage. Targets who have taken wound damage automatically fail the saving throw. Whenever a target dies in the area, the caster heals 1d8 hitpoints, if the caster is already at max hitpoints, instead gain 15 temporary hitpoints.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Damned
sa:items.spell:description: Sacrifice the integrity of your Self to inflict horrendous wounds on your targets. Target takes 4d8 necrotic damage. You take 1 sanity damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Darkness
sa:items.spell:description: You create an area of supernatural darkness. The area is 20ft radius and 10ft tall. Creatures in the area have disadvantage on perception checks and cannot see more than 10ft in any direction.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Detect magic
sa:items.spell:description: Sense the presence of magic and see magical auras.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Dimension door
sa:items.spell:description: Take a single step, covering great distances. You can move up to 500ft. You can move through creatures and objects, if you can see your destination.
sa:items.spell:target: One 5 ft square you can see within 500ft

sa:items.rdfs:label: Disguise Self
sa:items.spell:description: You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends or until you use your action to dismiss it. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear thin, fat, or in between. You can’t change your body type, so you must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Displacement
sa:items.spell:description: You project a ghostly double of yourself to confuse your attackers. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 1 round per proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Eldricht blade
sa:items.spell:description: A weapon you wield or summon becomes wreathed in crackling energy. You gain advantage on attack rolls against creatures affected by a debuff you cast. When your proficiency bonus is an odd number, your attacks with this weapon deal an extra 1d6 force damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Eldricht portal
sa:items.spell:description: You open a shimmering gateway linking two locations. You can target a location you know of or one you can see through scrying, magical sensors, video feeds, or similar means. The portal lasts for the duration or until you dismiss it. Creatures and objects can pass through freely. Each portal is a 5-foot-diameter circular opening on each end. You can dismiss it as a bonus action.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Energized Touch
sa:items.spell:description: Channel the searing power of the stars in the Touch of fingers

sa:items.rdfs:label: ethereal blades
sa:items.spell:description: Summon ethereal replicas of your melee weapon that slash and rend in a cone ahead of you

sa:items.rdfs:label: Faerie fire
sa:items.spell:description: You cause a creature to glow, making hiding close to impossible.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Favoured
sa:items.spell:description: Infuse your attacks with magical power

sa:items.rdfs:label: Feather fall
sa:items.spell:description: Turn a fall that might otherwise be fatal into a gentle descent.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Fireball
sa:items.spell:description: A tiny fiery globe streak from your outstretched hand and explode in an inferno at the target

sa:items.rdfs:label: Firebolt
sa:items.spell:description: Throw a fiery orb at a creature within range

sa:items.rdfs:label: Firelance
sa:items.spell:description: A line of fire rushes forward from your hands

sa:items.rdfs:label: Firestorm
sa:items.spell:description: You call elemental fire into being in a raging inferno burning everything in the area to a fine sprinkle of ash
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 1 round / proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Floating disk
sa:items.spell:description: Create a floating disc that can be used to carry heavy loads

sa:items.rdfs:label: Fly
sa:items.spell:description: ethereal wings sprout from the touched creatures shoulders, allowing it to fly.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute per proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Frozen armor
sa:items.spell:description: A layer of spectral frost covers you.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Frozen blast
sa:items.spell:description: Energy rushes out of your target reducing the temperature in their immediate vincinity to freezing temperatures.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Grease
sa:items.spell:description: Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-foot square centred on a point within range and turns it into difficult terrain for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Guiding bolt
sa:items.spell:description: Smite your a target and cause the next attack against your target to gain advantage

sa:items.rdfs:label: Healing word
sa:items.spell:description: Revitalize a creature with a word

sa:items.rdfs:label: Heartsqueeze
sa:items.spell:description: Form your hand into a claw as necrotic energies swirl around you quickly gathering in your hand and will a creature you can see heart to stop.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Hex
sa:items.spell:description: Break an electric or mechanical device.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Holy bolt
sa:items.spell:description: Launch a glowing missile at a creature within range

sa:items.rdfs:label: IM-Teleport
sa:items.spell:description: Teleport to someone you are chatting with using a instant messaging service.
sa:items.spell:target: Self and up to your proficiency bonus additional creatures

sa:items.rdfs:label: Ice storm
sa:items.spell:description: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds to the ground in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range

sa:items.rdfs:label: Identify
sa:items.spell:description: Identify the magical properties of an object or creature touched.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Incinerate
sa:items.spell:description: Your target bursts into flame. Taking 3d6 fire damage each round. Reflex save or submersion in water stops the fire.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Infernal cloak
sa:items.spell:description: Protect your targets from harm from radiant damage. Target gains resistance to radiant damage for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Inflict wounds
sa:items.spell:description: Inflict horrendous wounds on targets you Touch. Target takes 3d6 necrotic damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Light
sa:items.spell:description: You cause an object you Touch to shine with light for a time.
sa:items.spell:duration: 1 hour or until you cast this spell again

sa:items.rdfs:label: Lightning Touch
sa:items.spell:description: Reach out and Touch someone, with 50 000 volts.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Mageblade
sa:items.spell:description: A sword of shimmering blue energy springs flashes into being in your outstreatched hand

sa:items.rdfs:label: Magic ID
sa:items.spell:description: Create a false, but visually accurate ID card.
sa:items.spell:target: A piece of paper or plastic roughly the size of the ID you want to replicate

sa:items.rdfs:label: Magic missile
sa:items.spell:description: Magic missiles streak from your hands and hit whatever you aim them at

sa:items.rdfs:label: Malediction
sa:items.spell:description: Curse a target, causing your attacks to bite deeper.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Meat receptacle
sa:items.spell:description: You transfer your spirit into a corpse or living creature you touch, binding your essence to its body. Your original body falls lifeless, and you assume control of the new vessel. You retain your personality, memories, and intellect but gain the new body's physical traits and Hit Point maximum. The new body becomes your vessel until you cast this spell again. A living creature can make a Charisma saving throw to resist.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Meteor
sa:items.spell:description: Call down a meteor from the sky to strike a distant location. Each creature in a 200-foot-radius burst must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking bludgeoning damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Mind blast
sa:items.spell:description: Your target experiences terrifying visions, damaging the targets sanity.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Mind sear
sa:items.spell:description: Show a target what drives you. Let them glimpse the magnificense that is your patron

sa:items.rdfs:label: Patron's caress
sa:items.spell:description: Gently caress your target blessing them with a glimpse into the mind of your patron.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Patron aspect
sa:items.spell:description: You bask in the glory of your patron, temporary remade in its image.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Phantom steed
sa:items.spell:description: Summon a phantasmal horse

sa:items.rdfs:label: Phase blade
sa:items.spell:description: Use teleportation magic to move the cutting edge of your weapon

sa:items.rdfs:label: Premonition
sa:items.spell:description: You see the time of your own death, removing all doubt from the now.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 2 rounds / proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Protection from bullets
sa:items.spell:description: Bullets do less damage to you
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 10 minutes / proficiency bonus

sa:items.rdfs:label: Puppteer
sa:items.spell:description: Take puppeteer-like control of a creature's body, forcing it to move and act according to your will.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Raise dead
sa:items.spell:description: Bring a willing creature back to life

sa:items.rdfs:label: Ray of sickness
sa:items.spell:description: A ray of sickening greenish energy lashes out toward a creature within range.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Recharge
sa:items.spell:description: Channel magical energy into an exhausted creature or depleted magical object, restoring its abilities.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Refresh vitality
sa:items.spell:description: Refresh a target and let the target regain 1d8 hit points

sa:items.rdfs:label: Resistance
sa:items.spell:description: Protect your targets from harm from elemental damage

sa:items.rdfs:label: Restoration
sa:items.spell:description: Remove a debilitating condition or effect from a creature you touch.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sacred flame
sa:items.spell:description: Flames descend on a creature you can see within range.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sacred shield
sa:items.spell:description: Charge a shield with holy power or create a shimmering shield

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sanctified
sa:items.spell:description: Protect your targets from harm from necrotic damage

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sanctuary
sa:items.spell:description: You shroud yourself in magic energies, gently encouraging enemies to attack other targets.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Shield
sa:items.spell:castingtime: Reaction, which you take when hit by an attack or targete by magic missile
sa:items.spell:description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Shield other
sa:items.spell:description: Link yourself to a willing creature. Whenever that creature takes damage, the damage is split between you and it.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Shutdown
sa:items.spell:description: Send a pulse of magical energy that overloads and disables all electronic and mechanical devices in the area.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Starfall
sa:items.spell:description: Summon falling stars to strike up to five separate 5-foot squares you can see within range. Each creature in the targeted squares makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking radiant damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Steelsense
sa:items.spell:description: Extend your senses to feel the presence of nearby metallic objects, detecting weapons, armor, and metal traps.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Summon
sa:items.spell:description: Call otherwordly beings into existance, drawing in energies to give flesh to the incorporal primal energies behind the veil.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Thaumaturgy
sa:items.spell:description: Manifest a minor supernatural wonder such as causing tremors, amplifying your voice, or making your eyes glow.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Thunder blast
sa:items.spell:description: You hurl a lance of thunder at a creature you can see within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 thunder damage and must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target is pushed 5 feet away from you. On a successful save, the target takes no push effect.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Thunderus slam
sa:items.spell:description: You create a shockwave of thunder centered on yourself. Each creature within 15 feet of you must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking thunder damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Tools of the blessed
sa:items.spell:description: Whispered incantations bless the next single shot fired from your firearm. Your firearm glows with righteous fire or dark streamers of smoke and darkness ooze from it, depending on your allegiance. The next single attack roll you make with that firearm before the end of your turn gains advantage. This effect does not apply to burst fire or automatic fire.

sa:items.rdfs:label: True strike
sa:items.spell:description: You sense the perfect moment to strike, granting yourself advantage on the next attack roll against the target before the spell ends.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Unwilling shield
sa:items.spell:description: Magically compel a creature to interpose itself between you and harm, causing it to absorb damage meant for you.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Wirewalk
sa:items.spell:description: Teleport instantly along an electrical wire or conduit from one end to the other.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Witch arch
sa:items.spell:description: A beam of crackling, blue energy lances out toward a creature within range, forming a sustained arc of lightning between you and the target.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Wrecking orb
sa:items.spell:description: You conjure a sphere of destructive force near you. Each creature of your choice within 15 feet must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking force damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.
